LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF MAY-13-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT: 1) DEFENDANT SUBMITTED NO SEPARATE STATEMENT & CONCEDES NO DISPUTE AS TO THE FACTS SET FORTH; 2) COURT FINDS SCOTT PER GRANT DEED WAS OWNER NOT A TENANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT, RUTH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 85 LUCY ST, SF, CA $292.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $292.00, LEASE FORFEITED
